response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for text. Found '特者生存ワンダラー!!' in the top-left, indicating the song title. 2. Identified performers through visual recognition: Amane Kanata and Ichijou Ririka, with Hakui Koyori appearing later. 3. Identified the event as #IchijouRirikaBirthdayFestival2025 from the top-right corner. 4. Performed a search for '特者生存ワンダラー!! Hololive lyrics Japanese English'. The song is an original song by Amane Kanata. 5. Lyrics were not available on indexed sites, so lyrics fields are set to null as per instructions.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance of the song "Tokusha Seizon Wandara!!" (Survival of the Fittest Wanderer!!) by Hololive performers Amane Kanata, Ichijou Ririka, and guest Hakui Koyori, as part of the #IchijouRirikaBirthdayFestival2025 celebration. The video consists of the main song performance, followed by a short guest interaction and closing remarks.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata and Ichijou Ririka perform 'Tokusha Seizon Wandara!!' on a stage with a digital screen.
